creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Update to 0.2.1 which fixes some problems with 8bit displays
I'm the maintainer.

Fix: 

-Chris--mxG0cm38NFzPQdpn8OYehGKH87zGu4SdK2OY0HSwifNQ1kkC
